data.title: Land & Buildings presents underappreciated quality of First Industrial Realty Trust's portfolio and a substantial discount to NAV.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, Land & Buildings Investment Management, LLC released a presentation today as a shareholder of First Industrial Realty Trust (NYSE: FR). The presentation highlights the undervalued nature of First Industrial's warehouse portfolio, emphasizing the significant discount at which First Industrial is trading compared to its private market value and similar publicly traded companies. Land & Buildings points out the quality of First Industrial's assets and the discrepancy in its valuation, aiming to bring attention to the potential for higher returns.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Real Estate buys MorningStar Denver Senior Living Portfolio for $305 million, with 463 units in 3 communities.
data.description: In New York, Morgan Stanley Investment Management and MorningStar Senior Living have revealed the acquisition of a MorningStar senior housing portfolio by investment funds managed by Morgan Stanley Real Estate Investing. The purchase, worth $305 million, includes 463 units spread across three communities located near Denver. MorningStar, a prominent senior housing operator headquartered in Denver, will retain operation of these communities following the acquisition.

data.title: BeautyHealth's third annual Skintuition Report shows how changing consumer preferences are reshaping modern aesthetics.
data.description: The most recent publication highlights the impact of changing consumer preferences on modern aesthetics. The volume discusses how these shifts are reshaping the contemporary aesthetic landscape. Key statistics and insights regarding this topic are presented, offering valuable information on the evolving preferences of consumers.

data.title: Jet.AI & Consensus Core plan to build a Canadian data-center campus in the Midwest to meet AI demand; attracting hyperscale tenants.
data.description: In Las Vegas, NV, on December 4, 2025, Jet.AI Inc. ("Jet.AI") (Nasdaq: JTAI) and Convergence Compute LLC ("Convergence Compute"), a joint venture between Jet.AI and Consensus Core Technologies Inc. ("Consensus Core"), revealed the site for Convergence Compute's new data-center campus in the Midwest region of Canada. This facility aims to cater to the increasing need for AI and high-density compute services in North America. The campus has attracted attention from major hyperscale clients due to its large-scale development.

data.title: Hovnanian Enterprises surpassed guidance metrics, saw 8% YoY increase in communities, refinanced $900M debt, with $34M expense.
data.description: The company successfully achieved or surpassed all projected metrics, with a notable 8% rise in consolidated communities compared to the previous year. Additionally, they completed a significant $900 million refinancing of unsecured debt, which extended the maturities until 2031 and 2033. The operating performance included a $34 million expense stemming from the refinancing process and an additional $19 million in land charges.

data.title: BigBear.ai backs Washington Commanders' "My Cause, My Cleats" charity campaign, showcasing cleats for nonprofit orgs.
data.description: BigBear.ai, a prominent provider of AI solutions for national security, revealed their participation in the Washington Commanders' yearly "My Cause, My Cleats" charity event. This initiative, running for a decade, enables players, coaches, and staff throughout the league to showcase specially designed cleats supporting various non-profit organizations. As a partner of the Washington Commanders, BigBear.ai joined in this campaign.

data.title: Lightbeam Health Solutions buys Syntax Health, enhancing value-based contract abilities. Integration includes incentive platform and actuarial services.
data.description: Lightbeam Health Solutions has announced the acquisition of Syntax, a move aimed at enhancing Lightbeam's AI-driven operating system for value-based care. The acquisition will integrate Syntax's cutting-edge incentive modeling platform into Lightbeam's existing services, and also bring onboard Syntax's actuarial services. The acquisition, finalized on December 4, 2025, bolsters Lightbeam's offerings in the value-based care sector, further solidifying its position as a leader in this space.

data.description: MoneyHero (stock symbol: MNY) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Friday, December 5, 2025. Analysts predict that MoneyHero will disclose an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.02. Shareholders are eagerly waiting for the company's announcement, anticipating results that exceed expectations and hopeful for positive guidance regarding the following quarter. This information is crucial for newcomers to the market as they consider investment opportunities. For additional details, refer to the complete article accessible at Benzinga.com.

data.title: PKF O'Connor Davies to hit $1B+ revenue milestone with new organizational structure for growth.
data.description: Accounting, tax, and advisory practice PKF O'Connor Davies revealed a revamped organizational structure to boost operational efficiency and reach a significant milestone of surpassing $1 billion in revenue. The firm, based in New York, announced this strategic shift towards enhanced leadership alignment and a cohesive approach to business operations on December 4, 2025. This move aims to streamline operations and maximize growth potential as they strive to achieve this impressive revenue milestone.

data.description: KNOT Offshore Partners (NYSE: KNOP) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Friday, December 5, 2025. Analysts predict that the company will announce an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.18. Investors are eagerly awaiting the update, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. This news holds significance for potential new investors in the company. For more information, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MarketStar named leader in Everest Group B2B Sales Services PEAK Matrix® 2025. Top ranking in assessment. Utah-based company shines.
data.description: In Ogden, Utah on December 4, 2025, MarketStar, a prominent company specializing in Sales-as-a-Service®, was recognized as a Leader in the Everest Group Business-to-Business (B2B) Sales Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment for the year 2025. MarketStar's top-ranking placement reflects its position as a global leader in this sector.

data.title: Victoria's Secret to release quarterly earnings on Dec 5. Analysts expect EPS of $-0.59. Past performance saw a 1.54% increase in stock price. Shares currently at $42.51, down 11.47% in the last 52 weeks. Market sentiment critical for investors.
data.description: Victoria's Secret is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on December 5, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.59, with hopes that the company will exceed this estimate and provide positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, Victoria's Secret surpassed EPS expectations by $0.20, resulting in a 1.54% increase in share price. The stock is currently trading at $42.51, down 11.47% over the past 52 weeks. Analysts emphasize the importance of paying attention to the company's forecast rather than just focusing on earnings beats or misses to gauge stock performance. Investors should stay informed about market sentiments and expectations regarding Victoria's Secret.

data.title: Build-A-Bear CFO warns tariffs impact will last until 2026, with Q3 FY 2025 revenue at $122.679M & net income at $8.1M.
data.description: Build-A-Bear Workshop, Inc. (NYSE: BBW) released its third-quarter fiscal 2025 results on November 1, 2025. The company reported a diluted EPS of 62 cents, surpassing the estimated 58 cents. Despite an increase in revenue by 2.7% to $122.679 million, it fell short of the expected $124.282 million. Pre-tax income decreased to $10.7 million, accounting for 8.7% of revenue, as compared to $13.1 million, or 11.0%, mainly due to around $4 million in tariffs and associated expenses. Net income also saw a decline from $9.9 million to $8.1 million. Net retail sales went up by 2.5% to $112.3 million, while consolidated e-commerce demand dropped by 10.8%. Commercial and international franchising revenue witnessed a 4.9% increase, reaching $10.4 million. The company's performance suggests cautious optimism.

data.title: ISPE's 2026 Facilities of the Future Conf. on 2–3 Feb 2026 in San Diego, USA, will feature keynote speakers and technical tracks.
data.description: The ISPE Facilities of the Future Conference for 2026 has been scheduled to occur on February 2-3 in San Diego, California, USA. Additionally, attendees have the option to participate virtually. The event is organized by the International Society for Pharmaceutical Engineering (ISPE). The conference will be held in North Bethesda, Maryland, with the announcement made on December 4, 2025. Keynote speakers and further details about the conference are to be revealed.

data.title: TreeServe acquires Schneider Tree Care in strategic move, expanding presence; Soundcore Capital Partners LP involved.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, TreeServe, LLC, a firm under Soundcore Capital Partners, LP, a private equity company headquartered in New York, announced its acquisition of Schneider Tree Care in Greenville, South Carolina. The acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, consolidating TreeServe's position as a key player in the region.
